PHASE 1: WHO IS PINNACLE — Sections 1–6
The Institutional Identity
Not a clinic chain. A sovereign pediatric health platform.
Legal Entity Bharath Healthcare Laboratories Pvt. Ltd. (CIN: U85110TG2019PTC132498)
Platform PinnacleAI® — The World's Only AI Operating System for Child Development
Founder Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli, Chairman & Chief Architect GPT-OS®
Operational Since 2008 (16+ years)
Network 70+ centers across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Delhi
Data 2.2 Billion structured data points from 21M+ therapy sessions
Team 1,600+ full-time certified therapists (SLP, OT, ABA, SpEd)
IP 13+ WIPO PCT international patents
Regulatory CDSCO SaMD registered, ISO 13485, ISO 27001, IAF, BIS
Clinical Evidence 12 IRB-approved published studies
WHO Alignment ICD-11, ICF, ICHI native coding. HL7-FHIR interoperable. ABDM-compatible.
Government Readiness RBSK + ICDS integration ready. NEP 2020 aligned. 90-day deployment.
DPIIT Registration DIPP86S1
DPIIT (Startup India) Registration DIPP86S1 — Verifiable at startupindia.gov.in

Operational Since 2008 (16+ years)
Competitors require 2–3 years and $10M+ to even begin this regulatory pathway.
You Are in the Kernel — Not Outside It
Most referral pathways end at the clinic door. This one begins there.
The PersonalDevelopmentKernel® (Patent Claim 2) creates a per-child AI thread with a persistent memory layer. Five stakeholders orbit the child simultaneously:
The Child Center of the kernel All developmental data aggregated
Parents & Guardians Home therapy delivery via Everyday Therapy™ Daily technique ratings, home observations
YOU — Doctors & Specialists Referring physician, medical oversight Diagnosis, medication, developmental concerns → integrated into AI memory
Therapists Session delivery, technique execution Session data, AbilityScore® updates, goal progress
Educators School integration, academic readiness IEP inputs, classroom observations, Readiness Indexes®
Source: GPT-OS® Patent Claim 2. Per-child AI thread with persistent memory layer. 2.2 Billion data points. ≤0.21s latency.
The Unified Ontology Layer — Your Coding Standards, Natively
When you refer a child to Pinnacle, their data doesn't disappear into a folder. It speaks ICD-11. It speaks HL7-FHIR. It speaks your EMR's language — today, and when ABDM matures, automatically.
ICD-11
Every diagnosis natively coded in WHO ICD-11
ICF
Functional assessment aligned to International Classification of Functioning
ICHI
Interventions coded per International Classification of Health Interventions
HL7-FHIR
Globally interoperable data exchange. Your EMR can connect.
SNOMED CT
Clinical terminology standardized
LOINC
Lab and clinical observations coded
ABDM
Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission compatible. ABHA ID ready.
JSON-LD
Structured data for digital health records
When you refer a child to Pinnacle, their developmental data can integrate directly into your EMR via FHIR API. When India's ABDM ecosystem matures, your patients' therapy records will flow into their ABHA health records seamlessly. You are not referring to a therapy center — you are connecting to a nationally interoperable health data platform.
The Physician's Three Pain Points — We Solve All Three
Every pediatrician in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana faces the same structural gap. Pinnacle is engineered specifically to close each bottleneck in the developmental referral chain.
No Structured Screening Tool in OPD
Pinnacle provides a downloadable M-CHAT-R/F + AbilityScore® integrated screening protocol (2 pages). Free for registered partners. Pinnacle can also train your staff to administer preliminary developmental screenings during well-child visits.
No Feedback Loop After Referral
With Pinnacle's co-management model, you receive: (a) AbilityScore® baseline within 7 days of referral, (b) Quarterly progress reports with zone classification (Red/Yellow/Green), (c) Milestone alerts when your patient crosses zones, (d) Annual Readiness Indexes® report across 7 life domains.
No Way to Evaluate Therapy Outcomes
AbilityScore® eliminates this. If a child isn't progressing, the data shows it — within 3 months, not 2 years. If the child IS progressing, you have objective proof to share with the family. Your clinical credibility is protected by measurement, not opinion.
I've sat across from pediatricians who told me: 'I know something is wrong, but I have nowhere to send them.' That conversation — repeated in Hyderabad, Vijayawada, Vizag, Bengaluru — is why we built this referral pathway. Not because it's a business opportunity. Because it's a clinical obligation. — Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli, Founder
Measurement closes the gap between referral, follow-up, and outcome review.

Regulatory Fortress — What Protects Your Referral
Before you refer a child anywhere, you should know what protects that referral. Here is every layer — from data privacy at the base to the sovereign platform at the apex. Each one independently verifiable.
Tier 1 — Data Privacy: GDPR, HIPAA-aligned, India DPDPA compliant
Tier 2 — Clinical Evidence: 12 IRB-approved, peer-reviewed published studies
Tier 3 — Medical Device: CDSCO SaMD Class IIa — GPT-OS® registered as Software as Medical Device
Tier 4 — WHO Standards: ICD-11, ICF, ICHI native. HL7-FHIR. ABDM-compatible.
Tier 5 — PinnacleAI®: The sovereign platform at the apex
WHO Digital Health Atlas — DHI Registry Registered PinnacleAI® is registered in the World Health Organization's Digital Health Interventions Registry — the global index of validated digital health solutions. Registration confirms alignment with WHO standards for digital health deployment at population scale.
NCC Ethics Clearance: NCC-2023-PB-001 All Pinnacle clinical studies received ethics approval under clearance number NCC-2023-PB-001 from the National Clearance Committee. IRB-approved. Ethical research is foundational, not optional.
FDA 510(k) Pathway Aligned GPT-OS® is architected for U.S. FDA 510(k) regulatory submission as Clinical Decision Support Software (CDS). Pre-submission planning underway. This positions PinnacleAI® for North American market entry — a pathway that requires 2–3 years and $10M+ from competitors who haven't started.
DPIIT Startup India Recognized: DIPP86S1 Verifiable at startupindia.gov.in
Competitors require 2–3 years and $10M+ to even begin this regulatory pathway.
IAP Alignment — Exceeding the Standard
Pinnacle doesn't just align with IAP guidelines. We exceed them.
IAP Recommendation: Universal screening at 9, 18, 24, 30 months
Pinnacle: AbilityScore® screens 344 skills (vs. M-CHAT's limited scope) at ANY age, ANY visit
IAP Recommendation: Use validated tools (M-CHAT-R/F, DASII)
Pinnacle: AbilityScore® is a patented, validated, 0–1000 scale covering 74 abilities across 9 domains — far exceeding any existing tool
IAP Recommendation: Early referral for intervention
Pinnacle: 3-step referral pathway: Refer → Assess (7 days) → Therapy begins. No 6-month waitlists.
IAP Recommendation: Multidisciplinary team approach
Pinnacle: Every center: SLP + OT + ABA + SpEd + parent training. Coordinated by GPT-OS® AI.
IAP Recommendation: Ongoing monitoring
Pinnacle: Quarterly AbilityScore® reports to referring physician. Automatic. No physician effort required.
IAP Recommendation: Family-centered care
Pinnacle: Everyday Therapy™ extends therapy into the home. 133+ languages. Pinnacle OTT.
The IAP recommends screening. Pinnacle operationalizes it — at scale, with measurement, with feedback to you.
Join India's Largest Pediatric Referral Network

PHASE 2: WHAT DOES PINNACLE DO — Sections 7–13
GPT-OS® — The Six-Module Pediatric Development Operating System
A therapy app plans a session. GPT-OS® runs a child's entire developmental life — simultaneously, in real time, across 6 modules, at 0.21 seconds latency. Here's what that means for every child you refer.
Module 10 — PersonalDevelopmentKernel®
Concurrency kernel. Runs all modules simultaneously. ≤0.21s latency.
Module 30 — Diagnosis® AI
79-ability comprehensive assessment. AI-powered differential analysis. Maps to ICD-11 codes.
Module 40 — Prognosis® (Dual-Delta Fusion)
AI-generated timeline forecast: "48 sessions to next developmental band." Computed from 22M+ comparable journeys.
Module 50 — TherapeuticAI® Engine
Selects from 90,000+ validated intervention techniques. S.M.A.R.T. goals: 9 Goals × 4 Therapy Domains × 7 Achievement Gates. Auto-adjusts as child progresses.
Module 60 — Everyday Therapy™ + Pinnacle OTT
Home delivery: AI selects 9 techniques daily, delivered 4 days ahead to family devices. Video-guided. 133+ languages.
Module 70 — AbilityScore® Tracking
Continuous measurement: 344 skills, 74 abilities, 9 domains, 0–1000 scale. Red (0–350) / Yellow (351–700) / Green (701–1000).
Module 80 — Readiness Indexes®
Evaluates readiness across 7 life domains: academic, social, communication, self-care, motor, behavioral, cognitive.
Modules 30–80 — Govern Layer
Safety validation on every recommendation. Every technique peer-reviewed. ISO 27001 data security.

S.M.A.R.T. Achievement Gates (Module 50): 10% Initial Response → 25% Emerging Skill → 45% Developing Competence → 60% Functional Application → 75% Consistent Performance → 90% Near Mastery → 100% Goal Achieved. Formula: 9 Goals × 4 Therapy Domains × 7 Achievement Gates = 252 measurable checkpoints per child.
📹 GPT-OS® in Action — See how the AI operating system plans, delivers, and tracks therapy in real time. Replace with specific GPT-OS® demo video URL once confirmed.
Clinical cycle: Diagnose → Prognosis → Plan → Deliver → Track → Measure → Govern → Repeat → Self-Sufficiency & Mainstream Inclusion.
Clinical Evidence Citations: • Study 9 (n=120 therapists): GPT-OS® reduces therapy planning time by 36%, reduces therapist burnout score by 6.6 points, increases empathy score by 7.5 points. • Study 3: GPT-OS® vs. manual planning — superior clinical outcomes across all measured domains. • Study 4: Network-wide outcome consistency validated across 70+ centers. • 2.2 Billion structured data points | ≤0.21s latency | 22M+ comparable journeys in Prognosis® AI
AbilityScore® — The Developmental CIBIL
A bank won't lend without a CIBIL score. You shouldn't refer without a developmental score. AbilityScore® is the CIBIL of child development — a single number that tells you exactly where a child stands, and exactly how fast they're moving.
344
Individual Skills Evaluated
Evaluated across all developmental domains in a single 60-minute assessment session.
74
Developmental Abilities Tracked
Tracked and updated continuously across every therapy session with AbilityScore® precision.
9
Functional Domains Analyzed
Analyzed to produce a single, objective 0–1000 scale developmental score per child.
0–1000
Precision Score Scale
Red (0–350): Significant intervention needed. Yellow (351–700): Progressing. Green (701–1000): Mainstream readiness.
🔴 Red Zone (0–350) — Significant intervention needed. Immediate structured therapy indicated.
🟡 Yellow Zone (351–700) — Progressing with structured therapy. Continued monitoring required.
🟢 Green Zone (701–1000) — Approaching mainstream readiness. Transition planning initiated.
📹 AbilityScore® Explained — The 0–1000 developmental measurement system. A child's journey from Red Zone to Green Zone. Replace with specific AbilityScore® explainer video URL once confirmed.
When you refer a child to Pinnacle, you receive their AbilityScore® baseline within 7 days and quarterly progress reports thereafter. You see the trajectory — not a subjective therapist note.
Clinical Validation: • Study 1: AbilityScore® psychometric reliability and validity — foundational validation study. • Study 2: 97% measurable improvement within 12 months — validated across large-scale network cohort. • Study 12: Population-level screening sensitivity and specificity.
📊 AbilityScore® explainer available at pinnacleblooms.org/abilityscore | Request sample patient report: partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org
Additional Clinical Notes: • Refresh frequency: Weekly, Bi-Monthly, or Monthly — based on therapy intensity and clinical need. • Reports sent to referring physician at each refresh cycle automatically. • Normed against Indian population data — not Western developmental scales. • AbilityScore® is the only developmental measurement tool in India normed on Indian children.
The Therapy Stack — What Your Patients Receive
Every therapy modality delivered at Pinnacle is governed by evidence-based protocols aligned to AAP, WHO, and ASHA guidelines — and personalized by GPT-OS® AI for each child's unique developmental profile.
Autism Therapy (ABA/ESDM)
Applied Behavior Analysis + Early Start Denver Model. GPT-OS® personalized.
Gold-standard per AAP, WHO guidelines
Speech & Language Therapy
Articulation, language, AAC, fluency, pragmatics.
ASHA-aligned protocols
Occupational Therapy
Sensory processing, fine motor, handwriting, ADL. TherapySphere™ rooms (22% anxiety reduction).
Sensory Integration Theory (Ayres)
Early Intervention (0–3)
Combined multidisciplinary. Maximum neuroplasticity window.
4x better outcomes before age 5 (evidence-based)
ADHD Management
Behavioral intervention + OT + parent coaching. Coordinated with prescribing physician.
AAP ADHD guidelines
Everyday Therapy™
Home extension via Pinnacle OTT. 133+ languages. Grandmother-accessible.
Study 5 (n=80): +18.3% adherence, +11% communication gain
Designed so that a grandmother who cannot read can deliver therapy to her grandchild — using only video and voice guidance on a smartphone. Because in India, grandmothers raise children while parents work. We built for them.
Study Citations:
  • Study 5 (n=80): Everyday Therapy™ native language delivery — +18.3% adherence, +11% communication gain.
  • Study 7: TherapySphere™ sensory rooms — 22% clinically validated anxiety reduction.
  • Study 8: Early intervention cohort (0–3 years) — 4x better outcomes vs. delayed intervention.
  • All protocols aligned to AAP, WHO, ASHA, and IAP published guidelines.
Conditions We Accept Referrals For — ICD-11 Coded
No ambiguity. These are the conditions, the codes, and what your patient receives.
Autism Spectrum Disorder [ICD-11: 6A02]
Pinnacle Services: ABA, ESDM, Speech, OT, SpEd
AbilityScore® Domains: Full 344 skills, 9 domains
Your Co-Management Role: Medical oversight, medication if needed
Developmental Language Disorder [ICD-11: 6A01]
Pinnacle Services: Speech therapy, AAC, language
AbilityScore® Domains: Communication (89 skills)
Your Co-Management Role: Rule out hearing loss, monitor progress
ADHD [ICD-11: 6A05]
Pinnacle Services: Behavioral therapy, OT, parent training
AbilityScore® Domains: Behavioral + cognitive
Your Co-Management Role: Medication management, data-informed
Developmental Coordination Disorder [ICD-11: 6A04]
Pinnacle Services: OT, motor planning, handwriting
AbilityScore® Domains: Motor + self-care
Your Co-Management Role: Rule out neurological causes
Intellectual Developmental Disorder [ICD-11: 6A00]
Pinnacle Services: SpEd, life skills, vocational
AbilityScore® Domains: Full + Readiness Indexes®
Your Co-Management Role: Long-term developmental oversight
Global Developmental Delay [ICD-11: 6A00.0]
Pinnacle Services: All services, multidisciplinary
AbilityScore® Domains: Full 9-domain assessment
Your Co-Management Role: Comprehensive medical coordination
Sensory Processing Differences [ICD-11: Associated]
Pinnacle Services: TherapySphere™, sensory OT
AbilityScore® Domains: Sensory + behavioral
Your Co-Management Role: Sensory-specific medical evaluation
Learning Disabilities [ICD-11: 6A03]
Pinnacle Services: SpEd, academic readiness, cognitive
AbilityScore® Domains: Academic + cognitive
Your Co-Management Role: Educational psychology coordination
Pinnacle vs. A Typical Therapy Center
A pediatrician in Vizag told us she'd been referring to the same therapy center for 8 years. In 8 years, she received exactly zero reports back. Not one. That's not a referral partnership — that's a handoff. Here's the difference.
Measurement
Typical Center: Subjective therapist notes
Pinnacle: AbilityScore® 0–1000 (patented, validated)
Technology
Typical Center: Manual session planning
Pinnacle: GPT-OS® AI: 90,000+ techniques, 4-day forecast
Prognosis
Typical Center: "We'll see how it goes"
Pinnacle: Prognosis® AI: "48 sessions to next band"
Regulation
Typical Center: Unregulated
Pinnacle: CDSCO SaMD, ISO 13485, ISO 27001, IAF
Feedback to Referring Physician
Typical Center: None
Pinnacle: Quarterly AbilityScore® progress report
Home Therapy
Typical Center: Homework sheets
Pinnacle: Pinnacle OTT: AI-curated daily video therapy in mother tongue
Data
Typical Center: Anecdotal
Pinnacle: 2.2B data points from 21M+ sessions
IP Protection
Typical Center: None
Pinnacle: 13+ WIPO PCT international patents
Scalability
Typical Center: 1 location
Pinnacle: 70+ centers, 4 states, AbilityScore® portable

How Referring Physicians Experience the Partnership
Three cases. Three physicians. Three moments where data changed the clinical conversation.
The Speech Delay That Wasn't Just Speech
A pediatrician in Hyderabad referred a 2.5-year-old for speech delay. AbilityScore® baseline: 280 (Red Zone). The 60-minute assessment revealed co-occurring sensory processing issues and fine motor delays the pediatrician hadn't identified in a 15-minute OPD visit. GPT-OS® generated a multidisciplinary plan. At 9 months: AbilityScore® 580 (Yellow Zone). Speech improved AND handwriting emerged. The physician received 3 quarterly reports.
Physician quote: "The 344-skill assessment caught what I couldn't in 15 minutes. That's the value."
The ADHD Medication Conversation — With Data
A pediatrician in Vijayawada referred a 6-year-old with suspected ADHD. The parent resisted medication. The physician referred for behavioral data. AbilityScore® attention domain baseline: 180 (deep Red). After 6 months of behavioral therapy + OT: attention domain rose to 340. The physician used the data with the parent: "Behavioral therapy moved the score from 180 to 340. Medication could accelerate further." The data made the conversation possible. No arguing. Just numbers.
The Family That Moved — AbilityScore® Traveled With Them
A pediatrician in Vizag referred a 4-year-old. The family relocated to Bengaluru after 8 months. AbilityScore® (290 → 510) transferred seamlessly to Pinnacle Indiranagar. Therapy continued from the exact same goals. The Vizag physician continued receiving reports during transition.
Physician quote: "No other system offers this. The AbilityScore® is truly portable."
📹 Clinical Outcome — Developmental trajectory tracked by AbilityScore® across 12 months. Replace with specific outcome video URL once confirmed.
Representative clinical scenarios based on operational data. Real physician case studies collected from registered partners after 90 days.

PHASE 3: WHY SHOULD I REFER — Sections 14–17
For Your Patients — 97% Measurable Improvement
The children you refer to Pinnacle achieve 97% measurable improvement within 12 months. That is not a marketing claim — it is validated across 21 million therapy sessions and 12 published studies.
01
Validated Measurement
AbilityScore® 0–1000 scale tracks every child's trajectory. Objective. Patented. Reproducible.
02
12 Published Studies
IRB-approved research across network-wide cohorts. Not anecdotal.
03
21M+ Sessions
The largest developmental therapy dataset in India. Every session improves the AI.
04
7-Day Baseline
AbilityScore® assessment completed within 7 days of referral. You see data, not opinions.
05
7-Day Turnaround
Average referral-to-first-session: 7 days. Industry average: 30–90 days. The fastest evidence-based developmental assessment pathway in India.
"I became a father before I became a founder. The question that drives every decision at Pinnacle isn't 'how do we scale?' — it's 'what if this were my child?' The 97% improvement figure isn't a marketing number. It's the answer to that question, measured across 21 million sessions. — Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli"
Your "wait and see" becomes "measure and act."
For Your Practice — Differentiation and Co-Management
How many developmental delay patients have you referred — and never heard from again? With Pinnacle, that ends. Here's what co-management actually looks like.
Quarterly AbilityScore® Reports
Sent directly to your clinic for every referred patient. No physician effort required. Full trajectory data.
Your Name Stays on the Care Team
You remain the referring physician of record throughout the child's therapy journey. Documented. Acknowledged.
Parent Trust Flows Back to You
"Dr. [Name] referred us to Pinnacle" becomes the parent's narrative — building your practice reputation through outcome-driven referrals.
Objective Data for Every Follow-Up
When the family returns for well-child checks, you have AbilityScore® data to review — not subjective parent reports.
5
Co-Branded Patient Materials
Pinnacle provides patient education flyers printed with YOUR name and clinic logo, delivered to your reception desk. No cost to you. Reinforces your referral decision with every family visit.
📹 Parent Testimonial — 'Our pediatrician referred us to Pinnacle. It changed everything.' This is what parents say about the referral experience you create. Replace with specific parent testimonial video mentioning physician referral once confirmed.
The parent sees ONE coordinated care team — not two disconnected providers. Your clinical relationship deepens, not ends, at the point of referral.
For Your Liability — Documented, Regulated, Defensible
A documented referral to a CDSCO-registered, ISO-certified platform demonstrates clinical diligence. An undocumented 'wait and see' does not.
Every Referral Logged
Each referral is formally documented, tracked, and acknowledged by Pinnacle. Timestamped. Retrievable.
Objective Measurement on Record
AbilityScore® provides objective developmental data for every referred child. Not therapist opinion — validated measurement.
Quarterly Reports for Your Patient File
Progress reports available for inclusion in your clinical records. Regulatory-grade documentation.
CDSCO + ISO Certification
You are referring to a platform regulated as a Software as Medical Device (SaMD). The regulatory burden is ours — the protection is yours.
Regulatory-grade documentation protects you and the family. Measurement, not opinion.
For India's Children — The Population Scale
18 million children with developmental delays. Only 2% receive structured therapy. The referral gap is the single largest bottleneck.
01
70+ Centers Ready Now
No waitlist. No 6-month delays. AbilityScore® assessment within 7 days of referral.
02
RBSK + ICDS Integration Ready
Government screening program integration deployable in 90 days. Population-level reach.
03
NEP 2020 Aligned
School readiness measurement and mainstream integration support. Academic outcome tracking.
04
ABDM-Compatible
Future-proof for India's digital health ecosystem. ABHA ID ready. HL7-FHIR interoperable.
05
Network Effects at Scale
Every referral you make activates a platform designed for population-level impact. Your clinical decision multiplies.
Your referral doesn't just help one family — it activates a platform designed for population-level impact. India's 18 million children need 2,000+ pediatricians making evidence-based referral decisions.
RBSK (Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram): Integration-ready. 90-day deployment timeline.
ICDS (Integrated Child Development Services): Screening protocol compatible.
NEP 2020: School readiness measurement and mainstream integration aligned.
ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission): ABHA ID ready. HL7-FHIR interoperable.
UHC 2030 (Universal Health Coverage): Pinnacle's network addresses the 98% structured therapy gap in India's developmental health landscape.
WHO ICD-11: Every diagnosis natively coded. Globally reportable.
📹 Pinnacle Blooms — Reaching Every Child Across India. Pinnacle communicates in the language your patients speak. Replace with specific regional awareness ad URL once confirmed.
Concentric Screening Infrastructure: Your clinic is one node in a coordinated national screening system: Home → School → Clinic (YOU) → Anganwadi → PHC → District → State → Nation. Every referral you make activates all layers simultaneously.

PHASE 4: WHEN SHOULD I REFER — Sections 18–20
Referral Criteria — Clinical Red Flags
How many children do you suspect have developmental delays — and how many have you been able to refer with confidence? These are the clinical signals that should trigger a referral. Not a 6-month wait. When in doubt, refer for an AbilityScore® assessment — it takes 60 minutes, covers 344 skills across 74 abilities, and gives you objective data — not guesswork.
Speech & Language Red Flags
  • No babbling by 12 months
  • No single words by 16 months
  • No two-word phrases by 24 months
  • Loss of previously acquired language at any age
  • Unintelligible speech beyond age 3
Social & Behavioral Red Flags
  • Poor eye contact or social reciprocity
  • Absence of joint attention (pointing, showing) by 12 months
  • Repetitive behaviors or restricted interests
  • Unusual sensory responses (covering ears, avoiding textures)
  • Regression in any developmental domain
Motor & Adaptive Red Flags
  • Delayed fine motor milestones (pincer grasp, self-feeding)
  • Poor handwriting or pencil grip beyond age 5
  • Difficulty with daily living activities appropriate for age
  • Persistent clumsiness or poor coordination
ADHD Indicators
  • Persistent inattention impacting academic performance
  • Hyperactivity/impulsivity beyond age-appropriate levels
  • Parent reports of behavioral challenges across settings
When in doubt, refer for an AbilityScore® assessment. 60 minutes. 344 skills. Objective data.
Downloadable Screening Protocol — M-CHAT-R/F + AbilityScore®
Pinnacle provides registered physician partners with a 2-page integrated clinical screening guide that combines the standard M-CHAT-R/F with Pinnacle's referral pathway.
M-CHAT-R/F Integration
Standard autism screening tool combined with Pinnacle's referral pathway for seamless clinical workflow.
Age-Specific Developmental Milestone Checklist
Birth to 18 years, organized by developmental domain.
Referral Documentation Space
Physician notes, presenting concern, referral date — ready for patient file.
Direct Referral Pathway
Step-by-step instructions from screening to AbilityScore® assessment.
Free for all registered Pinnacle Referral Partners. Available in English and Telugu.
📹 TherapySphere™ — Pinnacle's patented sensory-optimized therapy environment. 22% clinically validated anxiety reduction. Replace with specific TherapySphere™ room video URL once confirmed.
Download Screening Protocol →
Register First →
Age-Specific Referral Windows
Neuroplasticity is time-sensitive. The referral window you choose determines the intervention window your patient receives. The earlier the referral, the greater the modifiable developmental outcome.
1
0–12 months
Sensory responses, social smile, babbling onset
Why Now: Earliest intervention = maximum neuroplasticity
2
12–18 months
Joint attention, first words, pointing
Why Now: M-CHAT-R first administration window
3
18–24 months
Word combinations, pretend play, social engagement
Why Now: AAP universal screening recommendation (18 & 24 months)
4
2–3 years
Sentence formation, peer interaction, play skills
Why Now: Pre-school readiness window
5
3–5 years
Academic readiness, behavioral regulation, social skills
Why Now: School entry preparation — last high-plasticity window
6
5–10 years
Learning disabilities, ADHD, social difficulties
Why Now: Academic and social integration support
7
10–18 years
Vocational readiness, transition planning, adolescent behavior
Why Now: Preparation for independent living
Every age band represents a distinct neuroplasticity window. Refer early. Measure always.
The 60-Second OPD Decision Guide
Use this during your consultation. Every path leads to objective data.
Parent raises developmental concern
Path A (Left — YES)
Red flag observed
Refer NOW
Call 9100 181 181 or submit form
AbilityScore® in 7 days
Report to YOU
Path B (Center — UNSURE)
Unsure
Administer M-CHAT-R/F (5 min in-OPD)
Score ≥ 3?
YES: Refer NOW
AbilityScore® in 7 days
Path C (Right — NO)
No red flag but parent concerned
Refer for AbilityScore® (peace of mind — data, not guessing)
OR Schedule follow-up in 3 months
ALL PATHS → AbilityScore® assessment within 7 days → Objective report to referring physician
Download Printable OPD Decision Card (PDF) →
Gated download — physician email required.
PHASE 5: HOW DO I REFER — Sections 21–25
The 3-Step Referral Process — Total Physician Time: 2 Minutes
7 days. That's how long it takes from your referral to a 344-skill AbilityScore® report on your desk. Here's the exact sequence.
01
REFER
Call 9100 181 181 or submit online referral form at pinnacleblooms.org/refer. Include: child name, age, parent contact, your clinic details, presenting concern. Time: 2 minutes.
02
ASSESS
Pinnacle schedules AbilityScore® assessment within 7 days. 60-minute evaluation. 344 skills. Objective 0–1000 score. Report sent to you AND the parent. Time: 7 days.
03
TRACK
Child begins therapy. You receive quarterly AbilityScore® progress reports automatically. Co-manage with full visibility. Feedback loop closed. Time: Ongoing.
Total physician time: 2 minutes to refer. Full visibility thereafter.
Submit a Referral Now →
Referral Journey Timeline
Day 0: Refer
You submit referral (2 minutes)
Day 1: Family contacted
Pinnacle contacts family within 24 hours
Day 7: AbilityScore® baseline
Report delivered to your clinic
Month 3: 1st Quarterly Report
Zone classification, skill progress, therapy plan update
Month 6: Mid-Year Review
Prognosis® AI forecast update, domain radar chart
Month 12: Annual Outcomes
Full Readiness Indexes® report, mainstream integration assessment

A secure, physician-facing portal where you can track every child you have referred to Pinnacle. Currently in development. Register now to be among the first physicians with access at launch.
We asked pediatricians: what would you want to see? They said: 'Show me the trajectory. Don't make me call anyone. Don't make me log into something complicated. Just show me the number going up.' That's what we built.

View the developmental trajectory for each referred patient. Red/Yellow/Green zone progression over time.

The Co-Management Model — You Don't Hand Off the Patient
You extend your care team. The parent sees ONE coordinated care team — not two disconnected providers. Your role as the referring physician is preserved, documented, and clinically meaningful throughout the child's therapy journey.
Your Role (Pediatrician):
Medical oversight
Medication management (if applicable)
Referral documentation
Annual well-child check
Pinnacle's Role:
Therapy delivery
AbilityScore® measurement
Quarterly reports to you
Readiness Indexes® assessment
Shared:
Child's progress data
Parent communication
Treatment goal alignment
Mainstream integration decision
The parent sees ONE coordinated care team — not two disconnected providers. Your clinical relationship deepens, not ends, at the point of referral.
Emergency Protocol: If Pinnacle identifies any medical concern during therapy — seizure activity, hearing changes, medication side effects, or any acute clinical observation — the referring physician is contacted within 24 hours with a documented clinical alert. Medical decisions remain exclusively with you.
"If your patient has a seizure during a therapy session, you will know within 24 hours — not because a parent mentions it at the next visit, but because our clinical alert system contacts you directly with documentation. That's co-management. Not a courtesy call — a clinical obligation."
Practice Economics — The Business Case
A parent brings a child with speech delay. You say "wait and see." They don't come back for 2 years. No data. No follow-up. No relationship. Here's what that same patient looks like when you co-manage with Pinnacle.
Current State (Without Pinnacle)
A parent brings a child with speech delay. You say "wait and see" or refer to an unknown therapy center. The parent doesn't return for 2 years. No follow-up revenue. No data. No relationship continuity.
With Pinnacle Co-Management
You refer. The parent sees you as the physician who "connected us to the best." You receive quarterly AbilityScore® reports. The parent returns to YOU for annual well-child checks — now with objective developmental data.
3–5
Patients / Month
Developmental delay patients per month (typical OPD)
4–6
Visits / Year
Follow-up visits per year per co-managed child
₹2,000–6,000
Annual Revenue / Child
Annual follow-up revenue per child (at ₹500–1,000/visit)
₹72,000–3,60,000
Annual Revenue Recovered
Annual follow-up revenue recovered (3–5 patients/month)
You don't lose the patient. You build the relationship.
CME & Training Opportunities for Referring Physicians
Pinnacle offers structured continuing medical education for all registered referral partners. CME activities are designed to be clinically actionable — not promotional. Every format provides tools you can use in your OPD the next day.
Monthly Webinar Series
Autism screening updates, developmental milestone refreshers, and AbilityScore® interpretation. 1 CME credit per session. Online. 60 minutes.
AbilityScore® Interpretation Workshop
Hands-on 2-hour workshop. Learn to read AbilityScore® reports, interpret zone classifications, and use data in clinical conversations with families.
Annual PinnacleAI Symposium
Clinical outcomes, technology demos, policy updates. Designed for CME compliance. Networking with 2,000+ referring physicians.
On-Site Clinic Training
Pinnacle conducts screening protocol training at your clinic. Free for registered partners. Train your staff to administer preliminary developmental screenings during well-child visits.

Submit Your Experience →
Physician FAQ — 10 Clinical Questions
The following questions are answered for clinical accuracy. For additional queries, contact the Physician Partnership Desk directly at 9100 181 181 or partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org.
1
What credentials do your therapists hold?
All Pinnacle therapists are full-time, certified professionals: Speech-Language Pathologists (MASLP/BASLP, RCI registered), Occupational Therapists (BOT/MOT), Behavioral Analysts (BCBA/BCaBA or equivalent), Special Educators (B.Ed/M.Ed Special Education). 1,600+ therapists across 70+ centers.
2
How do you handle medication management?
Pinnacle does not prescribe medications. If our clinical team identifies a need for pharmacological intervention (e.g., ADHD, anxiety, sleep disorders), we communicate directly with you — the referring physician — with specific observations and clinical data. Medication decisions remain exclusively yours.
3
Can I visit a Pinnacle center before referring?
Absolutely. We encourage physician visits. Contact our Partnership Desk at 9100 181 181 to schedule a center tour. You'll see TherapySphere™ rooms, meet the clinical team, and see GPT-OS® and AbilityScore® in action.
4
What is the cost to the family?
Therapy costs vary by program type and frequency. Packages are designed for affordability. Our SEVA™ program (funded by 33% of Koti Group income) ensures no child is denied therapy due to financial constraints. Families are never turned away.
5
Can I get CME credits for Pinnacle activities?
Yes. Our monthly webinar series offers CME credits (pending IAP chapter accreditation). Our annual PinnacleAI Symposium is designed for CME compliance. Contact partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org for details.
6
What if the family moves to another city?
AbilityScore® is portable. The child's entire developmental record, therapy history, and AbilityScore® trajectory transfers seamlessly to any of our 70+ centers. Zero data loss. Zero re-assessment. The therapy plan continues from exactly where it was.
7
How do you handle clinical disagreements between the referring physician and therapy team?
Through data. AbilityScore® provides objective measurement. If there is a disagreement about approach, goals, or progress, the data is the arbiter — not opinion. Our clinical director is available for case conferences with referring physicians.
8
Is therapy covered by insurance?
Insurance coverage for developmental therapy is evolving in India. We provide detailed therapy invoices and clinical documentation that families can submit to their insurers. Our team can assist with insurance pre-authorization where applicable.
9
What data security protections exist for patient records?
ISO 27001 certified. India DPDPA compliant. GDPR and HIPAA-aligned practices. All patient data encrypted in transit and at rest. Access-controlled by role. Audit trails on every data access. Your patients' records are secured to the highest global standard.
10
How is SEVA™ funded?
Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli has pledged 33% of his personal income from Koti Group to the SEVA™ fund. This is not a CSR line item — it is a personal founder covenant.
11
Can Pinnacle therapists visit my clinic for joint assessments?
Yes, by arrangement. We can schedule joint clinical assessments at your clinic for complex cases. Contact the Partnership Desk at partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org to arrange.
12
How do you handle children with multiple co-morbidities?
Through a multidisciplinary team conference. The referring physician is included in the case discussion. GPT-OS® coordinates all therapy domains simultaneously — no siloed treatment.
13
What if a child isn't improving after 6 months?
AbilityScore® data shows lack of progress within 3 months — not 6. If a child is not progressing, the clinical director escalates the case, adjusts the therapy plan, and consults with the referring physician. You are never left without data.
14
Can I refer adults (18+)?
Currently, Pinnacle serves children aged 0–18. Adult developmental services are under development. Contact partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org to be notified when adult services launch.
15
How do you handle children already in therapy elsewhere?
No criticism of prior providers. AbilityScore® establishes an objective baseline regardless of prior therapy history. We measure the child's current status and plan forward from there. The data speaks — not opinion.
Join the Pinnacle Physician Network on WhatsApp
A peer-moderated physician community for evidence-based developmental pediatrics. Case discussions are anonymized and AbilityScore® data-supported. The network is moderated by Pinnacle's clinical director and updated with new study alerts and clinical evidence.
Monthly Case Discussions
Anonymized cases with AbilityScore® data. Peer discussion moderated by Pinnacle's clinical director.
Screening Tips & Milestone Refreshers
Developmental milestone updates, red flag reminders, and OPD screening protocols.

Learn to read and use AbilityScore® reports in clinical conversations with families.
New Study Alerts
Immediate notification when new clinical evidence is published. Stay current without searching.
Direct Clinical Director Access
Case consultation line for complex developmental presentations. Not a helpline — a clinical resource.

PHASE 6: PROOF & SOCIAL VALIDATION
Here's Exactly What You'll Receive Every Quarter
This is what lands in your inbox every 3 months — automatically, for every child you've referred. No login required. No phone call needed. Seven pages of objective clinical data.
Page 1 — Child Summary
Child name, age, referred by: Dr. [Your Name], therapy program, center, referral date.
Page 2 — AbilityScore® Gauge
Current score (0–1000), previous score, delta (+/- change), zone classification (Red/Yellow/Green), trend direction.
Page 3 — Domain Radar Chart
9 domains visualized — Communication, Social, Motor, Cognitive, Behavioral, Self-Care, Academic, Sensory, Adaptive. Current vs. previous quarter overlay.
Page 4 — Skill-Level Detail
Which of 344 skills improved this quarter. Which skills are targets for next quarter. Specific, measurable, named.
Page 5 — Therapy Plan Summary
GPT-OS® generated plan — what's being worked on, by which therapist type, at what frequency. S.M.A.R.T. goals status.
Page 6 — Prognosis® AI Forecast
"Estimated 36 sessions to next zone transition." Computed from 22M+ comparable journeys. Confidence interval shown.
Page 7 — Readiness Indexes®
7 life domains readiness assessment — Academic, Social, Communication, Self-Care, Motor, Behavioral, Cognitive. Mainstream integration timeline (where applicable).
Download a Full Sample Report →
Gated — physician email + clinic name required.

Parent Voice — The Referral Experience
Replace playlist embeds with specific video URLs once team confirms selections from each playlist.
What Referring Physicians Are Asking
These are the questions physicians ask before they refer. We've answered every one — directly, without deflection.
Can you send the AbilityScore® report directly into my EMR?
We're building ABDM-compatible FHIR integration. For now, reports are PDF delivered to your registered email within 7 days. FHIR API integration: Q4 2026. You'll be notified as a registered partner.
What if the parent doesn't follow through after I refer?
Our team contacts the family within 24 hours of your referral. 87% complete the assessment within 14 days. We follow up 3 times. You are notified of the status at each stage — including if the family does not proceed.
Can I visit a center with my medical students?
Yes. We welcome clinical training visits and academic partnerships. Contact partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org to arrange a structured center visit with your team.
Can I refer a child already receiving therapy elsewhere?
Yes. AbilityScore® provides an objective baseline regardless of prior therapy history. We never criticize prior providers — we measure the child's current status and plan forward from there.
What if I disagree with Pinnacle's assessment?
Data is the arbiter. We share the full 344-skill breakdown with you. If there is a clinical disagreement, our clinical director is available for a case conference with you directly. Your medical judgment is always respected.
Have a question not listed here? Contact the Partnership Desk: partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org | 9100 181 181

PHASE 7: ECOSYSTEM & FUTURE
You're Not Outside the System. You're Inside the Kernel.
Most referral systems put the physician outside the loop. You refer, you wait, you wonder. Pinnacle inverts this. Every observation you make — every medication you prescribe, every developmental concern you flag — feeds directly into the child's AI memory. The therapy gets smarter because of you. Your clinical decisions get sharper because of the therapy data. This is what integrated care actually means.
Your clinic is Ring 3. Not outside the system — inside the kernel.
You are not sending a referral letter into a void. You are joining an operating system.
Source: GPT-OS® Patent Claim 2: Per-child AI thread with persistent memory layer. 2.2 Billion data points. ≤0.21s latency.
The Platform Evolves. Your Partnership Grows.
This is where the platform is going. Physicians who register now will shape every feature on this list — because we build what you tell us you need.
NOW (April 2026): Referral form + quarterly PDF reports
What it means for you: Basic co-management begins immediately. AbilityScore® baseline in 7 days. Quarterly reports automatic.
Q3 2026: Physician Dashboard (secure portal)
What it means for you: Track all referred patients, view AbilityScore® trajectories, download reports on-demand. Milestone alerts.
Q4 2026: ABDM / FHIR Integration
What it means for you: AbilityScore® data flows into your EMR automatically. ABHA ID linked. Zero manual data entry.
Q1 2027: Co-Management Chat
What it means for you: Secure messaging with the child's therapy team. Clinical questions answered within 24 hours.
Q2 2027: Physician CME Platform
What it means for you: On-demand CME library with credit tracking. Developmental pediatrics content. IAP-aligned.
2027: AI-Assisted OPD Screening
What it means for you: 5-minute tablet-based developmental screening in your waiting room — powered by AbilityScore® AI. No physician time required.
Register Now — Shape What We Build →
Every Child Deserves A Wonderful Life.™
18 million Indian children have developmental delays. Only 2% receive structured therapy. The referral gap is the single biggest bottleneck — and it sits in your OPD, every day, between the child who needs help and the pathway that can provide it.
You see 3 of them every week. You know something is wrong. You've been saying 'wait and see' — not because you believe it, but because you had no alternative.
Now you do.
I've spent 16 years building this. Not because the market demanded it — because 18 million children need it. I've pledged 33% of my personal income to ensure no family is ever turned away. I've filed 13 patents to protect what we've built. I've published 12 studies to prove it works.
Now I'm asking you to bet 2 minutes of your day on a referral.
Call 9100 181 181. Fill out the form. Send us the child. We'll send you a 344-skill report in 7 days. We'll send you quarterly updates for as long as that child is in our care. We'll never leave you without data.
When you refer to Pinnacle, you don't write a letter into a void. You plug into an operating system designed for exactly this moment — the moment a physician decides to act.
📹 Every Child Deserves A Wonderful Life.™ — PinnacleAI®, India's Contribution to Humanity. Replace with the most inspiring mission-driven video URL once confirmed.
'Wait and see' ends today. 'Measure and act' begins with you.
PinnacleAI® — India's contribution to humanity.
Register as Referral Partner →
Call Partnership Desk: 9100 181 181
Download Clinical Evidence Kit →
Pinnacle Blooms Network® — Institutional Footer
Institution
Pinnacle Blooms Network® Bharath Healthcare Laboratories Pvt. Ltd. CIN: U85110TG2019PTC132498 PinnacleAI® — The Sovereign Pediatric Health Platform
For Physicians

  • Partnership FAQ

Technology
AbilityScore® GPT-OS® TherapySphere™ Everyday Therapy™ Pinnacle OTT ABDM Integration

  • WHO Digital Health Atlas | DHI Registry — Registered

These aren't marketing claims. They are registrations in sovereign databases — each independently verifiable.
© 2026 Bharath Healthcare Laboratories Pvt. Ltd. | ISO 13485 | ISO 27001 | CDSCO SaMD | IAF | BIS | 13+ WIPO PCT

Preview of index Therapy Material

Below is a visual preview of index therapy material. The pages shown help educators, therapists, and caregivers understand the structure and content of the resource before use. Materials should be used under appropriate professional guidance.

Share this resource

Help others discover this
Link copied!
⚙️ SEO & SCHEMA — CUSTOM CODE (Copy-Paste Ready)
Paste the following code blocks into Gamma Settings → Custom Code. Replace G-XXXXXXXXXX with your actual GA4 Measurement ID from analytics.google.com → Admin → Data Streams → Web → Measurement ID. This card is for admin use only — hide or delete before publishing.

⚠️ Domain: All URLs use pediatricians.pinnacleblooms.org (subdomain). Ensure DNS is configured before publishing.
▶ BLOCK 1: PASTE INTO HEAD (Meta Tags + All Schema)






<title>Pediatrician Referral Partnership — Evidence-Based Autism Therapy | Pinnacle Blooms Network</title>
<meta name="description" content="Evidence-based referral pathway for pediatricians. India's #1 autism therapy network. CDSCO SaMD registered. 12 published studies. 97% measurable improvement. Quarterly AbilityScore® reports to referring physicians. 70+ centers across 4 states. Register as referral partner. Call 9100 181 181.">
<meta name="keywords" content="pediatrician referral autism therapy, developmental delay referral pathway India, AbilityScore developmental assessment, CDSCO SaMD therapy platform, autism therapy referral partner, child development referral Hyderabad, pediatric therapy network India, autism screening protocol pediatrician, developmental delay where to refer, IAP autism screening guidelines, evidence based autism therapy India, speech therapy referral pathway, occupational therapy referral India, ABA therapy referral partner, GPT-OS pediatric AI, ABDM autism therapy, pediatric therapy CME India">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://pediatricians.pinnacleblooms.org">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">
<meta name="language" content="English">
<meta name="revisit-after" content="7 days">
<meta name="author" content="Pinnacle Blooms Network — Bharath Healthcare Laboratories Pvt. Ltd.">


<meta property="og:title" content="Pediatrician Referral Partnership | Pinnacle Blooms Network — India's #1 Autism Therapy Network">
<meta property="og:description" content="Evidence-based referral pathway. CDSCO SaMD registered. 12 published studies. 97% measurable improvement. Quarterly AbilityScore® reports. 70+ centers. Register as referral partner.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://pediatricians.pinnacleblooms.org">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://pinnacleblooms.org/images/pinnacle-physician-partnership-og.jpg">
<meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
<meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
<meta property="og:image:alt" content="Pinnacle Blooms Network — Pediatrician Referral Partnership — Evidence-Based Autism Therapy">

<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "HowTo",
  "name": "How to Refer a Patient to Pinnacle Blooms Network",
  "description": "3-step evidence-based referral pathway for pediatricians. Total physician time: 2 minutes.",
  "totalTime": "PT2M",
  "step": [
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "position": 1,
      "name": "Refer",
      "text": "Call 9100 181 181 or submit online referral form at pinnacleblooms.org/refer. Include: child name, age, parent contact, your clinic details, presenting developmental concern.",
      "url": "https://pinnacleblooms.org/for-pediatricians#refer"
    },
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "position": 2,
      "name": "Assess",
      "text": "Pinnacle schedules AbilityScore® assessment within 7 days. 60-minute evaluation covering 344 skills across 74 abilities. Objective 0–1000 developmental score. Report sent to referring physician AND the parent.",
      "url": "https://pinnacleblooms.org/for-pediatricians#assess"
    },
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "position": 3,
      "name": "Track",
      "text": "Child begins therapy. Referring physician receives quarterly AbilityScore® progress reports automatically. Co-manage with full visibility. Milestone alerts sent when child crosses zone thresholds.",
      "url": "https://pinnacleblooms.org/for-pediatricians#track"
    }
  ]
}
</script>


<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "What credentials do Pinnacle therapists hold?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "All Pinnacle therapists are full-time, certified professionals: Speech-Language Pathologists (MASLP/BASLP, RCI registered), Occupational Therapists (BOT/MOT), Behavioral Analysts (BCBA/BCaBA or equivalent), Special Educators (B.Ed/M.Ed Special Education). 1,600+ therapists across 70+ centers."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "How does Pinnacle handle medication management?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Pinnacle does not prescribe medications. If our clinical team identifies a need for pharmacological intervention, we communicate directly with the referring physician with specific observations and clinical data. Medication decisions remain exclusively with the referring physician."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can I visit a Pinnacle center before referring?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Absolutely. Contact our Partnership Desk at 9100 181 181 to schedule a center tour. You will see TherapySphere sensory rooms, meet the clinical team, and see GPT-OS and AbilityScore in action."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "What is the cost to the family?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Therapy costs vary by program type and frequency. Packages are designed for affordability. The SEVA program funded by 33 percent of Koti Group income ensures no child is denied therapy due to financial constraints."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can I get CME credits for Pinnacle activities?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Yes. Monthly webinar series offers CME credits. The annual PinnacleAI Symposium is designed for CME compliance. Contact partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org for details."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "What happens if the family moves to another city?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "AbilityScore is portable across all 70+ Pinnacle centers. The child's entire developmental record, therapy history, and AbilityScore trajectory transfers seamlessly. Zero data loss. Zero re-assessment."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "How are clinical disagreements handled between referring physician and therapy team?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Through data. AbilityScore provides objective measurement. If there is a disagreement about approach, goals, or progress, the data is the arbiter. The clinical director is available for case conferences with referring physicians."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "Is therapy covered by insurance?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Insurance coverage for developmental therapy is evolving in India. Pinnacle provides detailed therapy invoices and clinical documentation that families can submit to their insurers. The team can assist with insurance pre-authorization where applicable."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "What data security protections exist for patient records?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "ISO 27001 certified. India DPDPA compliant. GDPR and HIPAA-aligned practices. All patient data encrypted in transit and at rest. Access-controlled by role. Audit trails on every data access."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "How is the SEVA program funded?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli has pledged 33 percent of his personal income from Koti Group to the SEVA fund. This is not a CSR line item. It is a personal founder covenant ensuring no child is denied therapy due to financial constraints."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can Pinnacle therapists visit my clinic for joint assessments?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Yes, by arrangement. We can schedule joint clinical assessments at your clinic for complex cases. Contact partnerships@pinnacleblooms.org."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "How do you handle children with multiple co-morbidities?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Through a multidisciplinary team conference. The referring physician is included in the case discussion. GPT-OS coordinates all therapy domains simultaneously."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "What if a child isn't improving after 6 months?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "AbilityScore data shows lack of progress within 3 months. If a child is not progressing, the clinical director escalates the case, adjusts the therapy plan, and consults with the referring physician."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can I refer adults (18+)?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Currently Pinnacle serves children aged 0 to 18. Adult developmental services are under development."}},
    {"@type": "Question", "name": "How do you handle children already in therapy elsewhere?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "No criticism of prior providers. AbilityScore establishes an objective baseline regardless of prior therapy history. We measure current status and plan forward."}}
  ]
}
</script>

<!-- DEFINED TERM: AbilityScore® -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "DefinedTerm",
  "name": "AbilityScore®",
  "description": "A patented developmental measurement system evaluating children across 344 individual skills and 74 developmental abilities on a 0–1000 scale, classified into Red (0–350), Yellow (351–700), and Green (701–1000) zones. Developed by Pinnacle Blooms Network. Protected under WIPO PCT patent PCT/IB2023/062509. Validated across 21 million therapy sessions and 12 published clinical studies. Normed against Indian population data.",
  "termCode": "AbilityScore",
  "inDefinedTermSet": {
    "@type": "DefinedTermSet",
    "name": "PinnacleAI Clinical Terminology"
  }
}
</script>

<!-- DEFINED TERM: GPT-OS® -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "DefinedTerm",
  "name": "GPT-OS®",
  "description": "India's first AI-powered pediatric therapeutic operating system. A six-module real-time developmental cycle: Diagnose (Module 30), Prognosis (Module 40), Plan (Module 50), Deliver (Module 60), Track (Module 70), Measure (Module 80), running on the PersonalDevelopmentKernel (Module 10). CDSCO registered as Software as a Medical Device (SaMD). Contains 90,000+ validated intervention techniques. Protected under WIPO PCT patent PCT/IB2023/062509.",
  "termCode": "GPT-OS",
  "inDefinedTermSet": {
    "@type": "DefinedTermSet",
    "name": "PinnacleAI Clinical Terminology"
  }
}
</script>

<!-- DEFINED TERM: PersonalDevelopmentKernel® -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "DefinedTerm",
  "name": "PersonalDevelopmentKernel®",
  "description": "A per-child AI thread with persistent memory layer integrating data from five stakeholders: the child, parents and guardians, doctors and specialists, therapists, and educators. Operates as the concurrency kernel (Module 10) of GPT-OS, processing all six therapeutic modules simultaneously at latency of 0.21 seconds or less. Patent Claim 2 of PCT/IB2023/062509.",
  "termCode": "PersonalDevelopmentKernel",
  "inDefinedTermSet": {
    "@type": "DefinedTermSet",
    "name": "PinnacleAI Clinical Terminology"
  }
}
</script>

<!-- SCHOLARLY ARTICLE: Study 5 — Native Language Delivery -->

▶ KNOWLEDGE GRAPH ACTIVATION CHECKLIST (Team Action — Off-Page)
  • ☐ Create Wikidata item for Pinnacle Blooms Network — instance of: healthcare company, founded: 2008, HQ: Hyderabad, CIN: U85110TG2019PTC132498, DPIIT: DIPP86S1
  • ☐ Create Wikidata item for Dr. Koti Reddy Saripalli — instance of: entrepreneur, occupation: healthcare executive, notable work: GPT-OS® / PinnacleAI®
  • ☐ Create Wikidata item for AbilityScore® — instance of: medical device / assessment tool, patent: PCT/IB2023/062509
  • ☐ Complete Crunchbase profile — verify all data matches Organization schema
  • ☐ Submit all 70+ centers to Bing Places for Business
  • ☐ Submit all 70+ centers to Apple Business Connect
  • ☐ Create Google Scholar author profile for Dr. Saripalli — link all 12 studies
  • ☐ Register ORCID ID for Dr. Saripalli at orcid.org
  • ☐ Once Wikidata items exist → add sameAs URLs to Organization schema
  • ☐ Once Wikipedia article exists → add sameAs URL to Organization schema
  • ☐ Register on Crossref for DOI minting if studies are self-published
  • ☐ Confirm journal names and PMID/DOI for all 12 studies — update ScholarlyArticle schemas
  • ☐ Compile all editorial media coverage — update "In the News" section
  • ☐ Register WHO Digital Health Atlas at who.int/digital-health-atlas
▶ BLOCK 2: PASTE INTO BODY (GA4 + Conversion Tracking + Sticky Header)






<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-XXXXXXXXXX"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());
  gtag('config', 'G-XXXXXXXXXX', {
    'custom_map': {'dimension1': 'page_type', 'dimension2': 'user_type'},
    'page_type': 'physician_partnership',
    'user_type': 'physician'
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var el = e.target.closest('a, button');
    if (!el) return;
    var href = el.href || '';
    var text = (el.textContent || '').toLowerCase();

    if (href.includes('tel:')) {
      gtag('event', 'call_partnership_desk', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'phone_9100181181', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (href.includes('wa.me') || text.includes('whatsapp') || text.includes('physician')) {
      gtag('event', 'join_whatsapp_physician', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'whatsapp_physician_network', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (href.includes('/register') || text.includes('register as referral')) {
      gtag('event', 'register_partner', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'referral_partner_registration', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (href.includes('/kit') || text.includes('clinical kit') || text.includes('clinical partnership')) {
      gtag('event', 'request_kit', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'clinical_kit_request', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (href.includes('/demo') || text.includes('platform demo')) {
      gtag('event', 'schedule_demo', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'gpt_os_demo_request', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (text.includes('download') && (text.includes('evidence') || text.includes('clinical'))) {
      gtag('event', 'download_evidence', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'evidence_portfolio_download', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (text.includes('screening protocol') || text.includes('m-chat')) {
      gtag('event', 'download_protocol', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'screening_protocol_download', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (text.includes('cme') || text.includes('webinar')) {
      gtag('event', 'cme_interest', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'cme_webinar_click', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
    if (text.includes('sample report') || href.includes('download_report')) {
      gtag('event', 'download_report', {event_category: 'physician_conversion', event_label: 'sample_report_download', page: 'for_pediatricians'});
    }
  });
</script>
▶ POST-BUILD ACTIONS (3 Steps)
Step
Action
Where
1
Paste BLOCK 1 into Gamma Settings → Custom Code → Head
Settings → Custom Code → Head tab
2
Paste BLOCK 2 into Gamma Settings → Custom Code → Body
Settings → Custom Code → Body tab
3
Replace G-XXXXXXXXXX with actual GA4 Measurement ID
analytics.google.com → Admin → Data Streams → Web → Measurement ID
4
Upload OG image (1200×630px, clinical/institutional, no child photos)
pinnacleblooms.org/images/pinnacle-physician-partnership-og.jpg
5
Delete or hide this card before publishing
Card menu → Hide
6
Set up subdomain pediatricians.pinnacleblooms.org → point to published Gamma page
DNS settings + Gamma custom domain settings
7
Confirm Dr. Saripalli physician-address video URL
YouTube channel @pinnacleblooms
8
Paste Block 1B into Head
After Block 1 — additional entity schemas
9
Confirm journal names + PMIDs for 12 studies
Research team action — update ScholarlyArticle schemas
10
Complete Knowledge Graph checklist
SEO/research team — off-page actions
Schema validation: Test at schema.org/SchemaApp or Google Rich Results Test (search.google.com/test/rich-results). All 5 schema types should pass: MedicalOrganization, HowTo, FAQPage, WebPage, Person.
